forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.sentMessage: If that email is in our system, you'll receive a link to reset your password. Check your inbox.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Enter the token from your email and your new password.
reset.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from your email
reset.successMessage: Password updated successfully. Sign in with your new password.
